tasks.label: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / A) Sync dev-order (folder -> TSV + views)
tasks.detail: EXT workspace prerequisite: sync config/dev-order.tsv and views from current folder/script order.

tasks.label: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / B) Build aliases + EXT proxy pack (uses TSV master)
tasks.detail: EXT workspace prerequisite: builds aliases + EXT proxy pack directly (no TM loader generation).
tasks.command: H2O_BUILD_TS=$(node -e "process.stdout.write(String(Date.now()))") && export H2O_BUILD_TS && export H2O_ALIAS_MODE=symlink && export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_ORDER_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/config/dev-order.tsv" && export H2O_SERVER_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/apps/dev-server" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/loader/make-aliases.mjs" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/loader/make-ext-proxy-pack.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O EXT Prereqs Build Done" && echo "   Copied Server (apps/dev-server, in-tree): $H2O_SERVER_DIR" && echo "   Aliases (ON-only): $H2O_SERVER_DIR/alias" && echo "   EXT proxy pack: $H2O_SERVER_DIR/dev_output/proxy/_paste-pack.ext.txt" && echo "   Current Dev Controls build: ${workspaceFolder}/apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/dev-controls-oauth-google" && echo "   Ops Panel build: ${workspaceFolder}/apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/ops-panel"

tasks.label: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / C) Validate loader order (deps + pack + TSV)
tasks.detail: Checks dependency manifest, critical group order, cycles, phase violations, and proxy-pack drift before extension build.
tasks.command: export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_ORDER_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/config/dev-order.tsv" && export H2O_DEPS_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/config/loader-deps.json" && export H2O_PROXY_PACK_FILE="${workspaceFolder}/apps/dev-server/dev_output/proxy/_paste-pack.ext.txt" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/loader/validate-loader-order.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Loader Order Validation Done"

tasks.label: H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / A) 🟢 V3 / armed / oauth-google Build (active path)
tasks.detail: Dev-only extension step: builds V3 armed oauth-google controls into apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/dev-controls-oauth-google.

tasks.label: H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / B) 🔵 Lean Build Extension (unpacked, no controls)
tasks.detail: Lean dev extension step: builds apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/dev-lean (no popup toggles, slightly faster startup).

tasks.label: H2O: 3) 🟧 OPS PANEL / A) Build Ops Panel Extension (preview, unpacked)
tasks.detail: Ops Panel preview step: builds apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/ops-panel (separate extension icon scaffold).
tasks.command: export H2O_SRC_DIR="${workspaceFolder}" && export H2O_PANEL_OUT_DIR="${workspaceFolder}/apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/ops-panel" && node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/product/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/pack-ops-panel.mjs" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Ops Panel Preview Extension Built" && echo "   Folder: ${workspaceFolder}/apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/ops-panel"

tasks.label: H2O: 3) 🟫 DESK / A) Build Desk Extension (side panel, unpacked)
tasks.detail: Desk extension step: builds apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/desk (MV3 side panel helper extension).

tasks.label: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / D) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build + Validate (one click prerequisite)
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick prerequisite: runs the direct dev-rebuild entrypoint (sync + aliases + proxy + validation).

tasks.label: H2O: 3) 🟫 DESK / B) ⚡ QUICK: Workflow for Desk Extension
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick Desk workflow: runs the direct prerequisite rebuild, then DESK A.
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / D) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build + Validate (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 3) 🟫 DESK / A) Build Desk Extension (side panel, unpacked)

tasks.label: H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / C) ⚡ 🟢 QUICK ✅ RECOMMENDED: Workflow for V3 / armed / oauth-google
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick recommended dev workflow: runs the direct prerequisite rebuild, then DEV A (V3 armed oauth-google active path).
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / D) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build + Validate (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / A) 🟢 V3 / armed / oauth-google Build (active path)

tasks.label: H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / D) ⚡ 🔵 QUICK FAST: Workflow for Lean Dev Loader
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick faster dev workflow: runs the direct prerequisite rebuild, then DEV B (🔵 Lean).
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / D) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build + Validate (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / B) 🔵 Lean Build Extension (unpacked, no controls)

tasks.label: H2O: 4) 🟨 BOTH / A) ⚡ 🟢 QUICK Combined: Build V3 / armed / oauth-google + Ops Panel
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick combined outputs: runs Common C, then DEV A (V3 armed oauth-google active path) + OPS PANEL A.
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / D) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build + Validate (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / A) 🟢 V3 / armed / oauth-google Build (active path)
H2O: 3) 🟧 OPS PANEL / A) Build Ops Panel Extension (preview, unpacked)

tasks.label: H2O: 4) 🟨 BOTH / B) ⚡ 🔵 QUICK FAST: Build Lean Dev Loader + Ops Panel
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick faster combined outputs: runs Common C, then DEV B (🔵 Lean) + OPS PANEL A.
dependsOn: H2O: 1) 🟦 Common / D) ⚡ QUICK Combined: Sync + Build + Validate (one click prerequisite)
H2O: 2) 🟩 DEV / B) 🔵 Lean Build Extension (unpacked, no controls)
H2O: 3) 🟧 OPS PANEL / A) Build Ops Panel Extension (preview, unpacked)

tasks.label: H2O: #) 🟥 DEV / Z) ONE-BUTTON Rebuild V3 / armed / oauth-google (scripts + aliases + proxy + extension)
tasks.detail: One-button daily rebuild: common prereqs + V3 armed oauth-google extension (apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/dev-controls-oauth-google) + Prod Cockpit Pro (apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/prod) + Studio Launcher (apps/extensions/chatgpt/chrome/studio-launcher).

tasks.label: H2O: 5) 🟪 ARCHIVE / A) ⚡ QUICK Local Archive Snapshot (version changes only)
tasks.detail: ⚡ Quick local archive: saves version/hash-changed files, including the full tools tree, into the outer cockpit-pro/archive/ folder (Phase 8I-2 path hardening — in-repo archive paths are refused).
tasks.command: node "${workspaceFolder}/tools/archive/archive-snapshot.mjs" "${workspaceFolder}" && echo "" && echo "✅ H2O Local Archive Snapshot Done" && echo "   Folder: ${workspaceFolder}/../archive"

tasks.label: H2O: 5) 🟪 ARCHIVE / B) Local Full Archive Snapshot (--all)
tasks.detail: Local archive utility: full snapshot of scripts, UI targets, and the entire current tools tree into today's archive folder under the outer cockpit-pro/archive/ root (Phase 8I-2).

tasks.label: H2O: ARCHIVE / One (Pick)
H2O: ARCHIVE / One (Recent)
H2O: ARCHIVE / One (By path prompt)
H2O: GIT / A) Auto Commit (stage + message + commit)
H2O: GIT / B) Auto Commit (DRY RUN)
H2O: GIT / C) Auto Commit (USE CODEX/GITLENS MESSAGE FILE)
H2O: GIT / D) Auto Commit (DRY RUN + FORCE)
H2O: GIT / E) Release Commit Helper (pick script + size -> commit)
H2O: REV / Stamp @revision+@build (changed scripts)
H2O: RELEASE / A) Dry Run
H2O: SHIP / A) Release + Archive Snapshot
H2O: SHIP / B) Dry
H2O: SHIP / Commit+Bump+Changelog+Archive+Dashboard
H2O: DASHBOARD / Build (Manual)
H2O: DASHBOARD / Watch (Auto, 15s debounce)
H2O: DASHBOARD / Watch (Auto, 5s debounce)
H2O: 0) ⬜ META / A) Generate File Lists (workspace + git + parent workspace)
tasks.detail: Generates a file inventory report for the current workspace, tracked git files, and the parent folder including sibling workspaces. Writes to outer cockpit-pro/meta/reports/ post-8J-2.
tasks.command: mkdir -p "${workspaceFolder}/../meta/reports" && { echo '### Workspace Files (${workspaceFolder}) ###'; find "${workspaceFolder}" -type f | sort; echo ''; echo '### Git Repo Files (tracked only) ###'; git -C "${workspaceFolder}" ls-files | sort; echo ''; echo '### Parent Workspace Files (parent folder; post-5B contains only h2o-source/; dev-server absorbed into apps/dev-server/) ###'; find "${workspaceFolder}/.." \( -path '*/.git/*' -o -path '*/node_modules/*' -o -name '.DS_Store' \) -prune -o -type f -print | sort; } > "${workspaceFolder}/../meta/reports/file-list.txt" && echo '' && echo '✅ File list generated:' && echo '   ${workspaceFolder}/../meta/reports/file-list.txt'
